name: The Putrid Circle
flavor: Deep in the wilds, mushman druids have gathered to perform the ancient ritual, calling forth the rot that sustains all life.

interactions.history_event: ::name has delivered required goods to the Mushmen druids!
interactions.announcement: You have delivered required goods to the Mushmen druids of ::settlement!

interactions.history_event: The Putrid Circle ritual failed and the rot has escaped it's confines!

history_events.begin: Aspiring mushman druids have formed a Putrid Circle near ::settlement, beginning their ancient ritual.
history_events.success: The Putrid Circle ritual was completed successfully. The rot blossoms and the mushman rejoice.
history_events.failure: The ritual has called forth something ancient. A foul presence stirs in the wilds nearby, drawn by the druids chanting.
